rule.name: Overly Permissive Cordova Whitelist
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard navigation/network whitelist entries in Cordova config.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard allowlists can expose the app to untrusted content, data leakage, and code abuse.
rule.developer: Use strict origin allowlists and remove wildcard entries from production config.xml.
rule.reviewer: Verify whitelist rules are limited to approved domains and protocols.

rule.name: Insecure External URL Handling
rule.rule_desc: Detects browser launch calls that require URL validation and allowlist checks.
rule.vuln_desc: Unvalidated URL launches can enable phishing and malicious redirection.
rule.developer: Validate target URLs against approved schemes/domains before opening.
rule.reviewer: Check URL construction and ensure strict allowlist validation exists.

rule.name: Sensitive Data Stored in Web Storage
rule.rule_desc: Detects web storage writes that may include sensitive values.
rule.vuln_desc: Web storage is not suitable for high-value secrets and may leak data on compromised devices.
rule.developer: Use secure native storage plugins for credentials and tokens.
rule.reviewer: Verify sensitive data classes are excluded from web storage usage.

rule.name: Android Cleartext Traffic Allowed
rule.rule_desc: Detects insecure cleartext traffic settings in Android-specific Cordova builds.
rule.vuln_desc: Allowing cleartext transport weakens confidentiality and integrity.
rule.developer: Disable cleartext traffic and use HTTPS for all endpoints.
rule.reviewer: Validate Android network policy enforces secure transport.

rule.name: iOS ATS Disabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects App Transport Security disablement in iOS Cordova builds.
rule.vuln_desc: Disabling ATS increases risk of network interception and tampering.
rule.developer: Retain ATS defaults and define narrow exceptions only when strictly required.
rule.reviewer: Check Info.plist transport policy and exception domain scope.
